raw.message: Seriously, save yourself and don't play this game on the toilet, unless you want numb legs!🤣

hook.summary: A hand places physical blocks into a grid to complete a puzzle.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a person's hand fitting colorful plastic blocks into a blue board.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Falling, dreaming, talking in your sleep

scene_flow: Hand places green and yellow blocks into a physical grid.
Hand fits a red block and then an orange block to fill gaps.
The final blocks are placed to complete the puzzle layout.
Transition to the digital game logo and app store download buttons.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who find tactile organization and 'perfect fits' satisfying.
